comment.body:
Disagree about the “useless” yapping, and that’s sales. Done door to door sales for 3 years, that’s how it goes, and every company lives off of sales. He’s got great info of market mechanics considering he did it for 15 years. Combining his stuff with Alma’s had been game changing. 

I don’t know about the beef or whatever and frankly I don’t care about it, both of their info is fantastic and he’s a good trader too. Be like water and soak up the info from both of them, not to mention the community there is top tier as well. Lots of knowledge to gain from both.

comment.body:
my bias is very clear, and this is why i keep copy/paste the links into my posts.
where some of you usually get lost is the part where I describe you/interpret you the positioning.
No problem.. the more time you spend with it, the more you will understand it.

Intraday price actions are noise. While one can have an overall bias, the intraday PA can be noisy. Better not being married to any expectation, but have a read on the tape, 
define the lvls, define their meanings and wait for the right moment to step in with a trade just as I showed you in the past two weeks with 13/11 green intraday trades + other trades...(only 2 of them were loss!)

But at the more important inflections I'm there as you could see during this week to
